title: CrowdStrike Adds Former SentinelOne Executives to the Leadership Team
text: AUSTIN, Texas--( BUSINESS WIRE )--CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD) today announced that two key executives have joined its leadership team to continue driving momentum across the company's channel and small business segments, and to scale what is widely recognized by the market as the industry's most innovative modern security platform. Daniel Bernard has been appointed as chief business officer, and Raj Rajamani has been named chief product officer, DICE (Data, Identity, Cloud and Endpoint). Bernard will report directly to CrowdStrike founder and CEO, George Kurtz. Rajamani will report to CrowdStrike's chief product & engineering officer, Amol Kulkarni.
